name: Carry edge is conditional on Fed-cycle position (hiking/peak ON, cutting/bottom OFF)
hypothesis: The v015 carry edge concentrates in Fed HIKING and PEAK_HOLD periods and fails in CUTTING and BOTTOM periods, and this pattern holds across >=2 of 3 historical Fed cycles. If it appears only in Cycle 3 (2022-23), it is curve-fit and carry is dead.
motivation: v015_dossier.html confirms 2025-26 Sharpe ~0 (-0.015 yfinance / -0.085 OANDA) vs 2023-24 OOS +1.25. Trajectory 2021 -0.13 / 2022 +0.51 / 2023 +1.26 / 2024 -0.09 / 2025-26 -0.085 coincides with Fed hiking(2022-23)->cutting(2024-26). Test whether that is a Fed-cycle effect or a one-cycle artifact.

regime_rule.PEAK_HOLD: not hiking/cutting AND within 0.25 of trailing-12mo high
regime_rule.BOTTOM: not hiking/cutting AND within 0.25 of trailing-12mo low
regime_rule.NEUTRAL: flat and mid-range (in neither edge-ON nor edge-OFF group)

robustness.rule: A result that passes only at the locked params but fails at nearby values is FRAGILE, not confirmed.

confirmation_bar_all_must_hold.significance: permutation p < 0.05 (1000 shuffles of regime labels WITHIN each cycle) for Sharpe(on)-Sharpe(off)
confirmation_bar_all_must_hold.robust: consistent verdict across the robustness sweep

rejection_criteria.curve_fit: pattern present only in C3 -> carry is curve-fit/dead
rejection_criteria.not_fed_effect: C1 and C2 show opposite patterns
rejection_criteria.permanent_collapse: 2024-26 fresh (Fed cutting) does NOT show edge-OFF -> the collapse is permanent, not regime-explained

verdicts.CONFIRMED: bar met + robust -> regime gate justified (separate design)
verdicts.PARTIAL: C3-only or fragile -> curve-fit, carry dead
verdicts.REJECTED: no regime pattern -> carry dead unconditionally

data_plan: Generate ONE continuous 2015-01-01..2026-06-30 trade ledger for the 4 pairs via the canonical ForexBacktester.run_pair_with_trades (costed, VIX-gated = live v015 config). This fills the 2024 gap (absent from both meta_dataset_v1 [2015-2023] and forex_backtest_trades.json [2025-2026]) and fixes one config across all cycles. The 2024-26 fresh slice is the load-bearing forward test.
method: Annualized Sharpe per bucket via sovereign/reporting/equity_curve (canonical sqrt-n by trades/yr). Permutation via sovereign/discovery/gate. READ-ONLY; no live config; no commits.
isolation: Hash-lock BEFORE generating trades. No config/execution edits. Report-only.
hash_method: sha256 of json.dumps(body, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) minus hash_lock
